data.title: Add approach_viability_concern to validate-review-output.sh optional_top
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add approach_viability_concern to validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch:
1. Add 'approach_viability_concern' to optional_top set (alongside review_tier and escalate_review)
2. Add validation: if present, must be a boolean (true/false). True means the reviewer detected a pattern of hallucinations or fragile fixes suggesting a fundamentally flawed approach.
3. Follows the same optional_top pattern established by escalate_review (story 54eb-fd24) for consistency.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] approach_viability_concern in optional_top
  Verify: grep -q 'approach_viability_concern' plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh
- [ ] Validation tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL
